---
title: "Initial_Figures"
author: "Elizabeth Miles-Flynn"
date: "2026-03-18"
output: pdf_document
---

## Set Up
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(here)

getwd()
here()

Data_Clean <- read.csv(file = here("Initial Figures/SlaySMilesFlynnESuEData_Cleaned.csv"),
                      stringsAsFactors = TRUE)
Data_Clean$Date <- ymd(Data_Clean$Date)

Data_Clean1 <- Data_Clean %>%
  mutate(
    month = factor(
      month(Date),
      levels = 1:12,
      labels = month.abb,
      ordered = TRUE),
      Year = year(Date))

Data_Clean1 <- Data_Clean1 %>%
  mutate(
    Status = case_when(
      month %in% c("Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun") ~ "Before",
      month %in% c("Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec") ~ "After"))

Data_Clean2 <- Data_Clean %>%
  mutate(
    Status = case_when(
      Date <= as.Date("2024-07-03") ~ "Before",
      Date >= as.Date("2024-07-09") ~ "After"
    )
  )

unique(Data_Clean2$Date)
TotalP_fig1 <- ggplot(Data_Clean2, aes(x = Total.Phosphorus)) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Storm Status",
    y = "Total Phosphorus (mg/L)",
    title = "Distribution of Total Phosphorus Levels by Storm Status"
  )
print(TotalP_fig1)

```
